name: anafpy-connector-test
description: THROWAWAY TEST plugin: declares the anafpy MCP server as a plugin-provided connector to check whether a plugin-launched stdio server (a) runs under Cowork and (b) can read the LOCAL anafpy auth token store. Launched with an ABSOLUTE uvx path (the Desktop plugin launcher does not inherit shell PATH). Credential-less this round to isolate launch from credential injection. Remove after the test concludes.
